vaultPath.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault root. Falls back to OBSIDIAN_VAULT env var.

knowledgeFolder.description: Subfolder within the vault where knowledge notes live. Defaults to 'OpenClaw'.

maxRelated.description: Max related-note links to include per entry (default 5).

autoLog.description: Auto-write a knowledge note for every significant tool call (via the tool:executed hook). Default false.

autoLogSkipTools.description: Extra tool names the auto-logger should never log. Built-in skip list already covers knowledge_* and noisy lookups.

autoLogMinSignificance.description: Minimum significance score before a tool call is auto-logged (default 2).
